Try It Now View Docs

files.original:
"use client"; import { ClawKitProvider, Slot } from "clawkit"; export default function Home() { return (
{/* Nav */}
Acme SaaS
Features Pricing Docs
{/* Hero Slot */}
Powered by ClawKit

Build your perfect
dashboard

Press{" "} ⌘K {" "} to customize any section of this app with AI.
Every user gets their own personalized experience.

{/* Features Slot */}

Everything you need

{[ { icon: "⚡", title: "AI Generation", desc: "Describe what you want, get a component instantly", }, { icon: "👤", title: "Per-User State", desc: "Each user's customizations are saved independently", }, { icon: "🔄", title: "Version History", desc: "Roll back any component to a previous version", }, { icon: "🎨", title: "Slot System", desc: "Define customizable areas with context for better AI output", }, { icon: "🔌", title: "Pluggable Store", desc: "localStorage, your API, or any custom backend", }, { icon: "🛡️", title: "Error Boundaries", desc: "Generated components can't crash your app", }, ].map((f) => (
{f.icon}

{f.title}

{f.desc}

))}
{/* CTA Slot */}

Ready to customize?

Hit{" "} ⌘K {" "} and describe what you want. The AI will generate a React component and place it right here.

{/* Sidebar Slot */}

Quick Stats

{[ { label: "Active Users", value: "2,847" }, { label: "Components", value: "12,093" }, { label: "Uptime", value: "99.98%" }, ].map((s) => (
{s.label} {s.value}
))}
); }

prompt: Make the sidebar show a live clock with the current time and a motivational quote
clientCode: const Component = (props) => { const [currentTime, setCurrentTime] = React.useState(new Date()); const [quote, setQuote] = React.useState('The only way to do great work is to love what you do. - Steve Jobs'); React.useEffect(() => { const timer = setInterval(() => { setCurrentTime(new Date()); }, 1000); const quotes = ['The only way to do great work is to love what you do. - Steve Jobs', 'Innovation distinguishes between a leader and a follower. - Steve Jobs', 'The future belongs to those who believe in the beauty of their dreams. - Eleanor Roosevelt', 'Success is not final, failure is not fatal: it is the courage to continue that counts. - Winston Churchill']; const quoteTimer = setInterval(() => { const randomQuote = quotes[Math.floor(Math.random() * quotes.length)]; setQuote(randomQuote); }, 30000); return () => { clearInterval(timer); clearInterval(quoteTimer); }; }, []); const formatTime = (date) => { return date.toLocaleTimeString('en-US', { hour12: true, hour: 'numeric', minute: '2-digit', second: '2-digit' }); }; const formatDate = (date) => { return date.toLocaleDateString('en-US', { weekday: 'long', year: 'numeric', month: 'long', day: 'numeric' }); prompt: Add a button to import and show csv
clientCode: const Component = (props) => { const [csvData, setCsvData] = React.useState([]); const [headers, setHeaders] = React.useState([]); const [isLoading, setIsLoading] = React.useState(false); const parseCSV = (text) => { const lines = text.trim().split('\n'); if (lines.length === 0) return []; const headers = lines[0].split(',').map(h => h.trim().replace(/"/g, '')); setHeaders(headers); const rows = lines.slice(1).map(line => { const values = line.split(',').map(v => v.trim().replace(/"/g, '')); const row = {}; headers.forEach((header, index) => { row[header] = values[index] || ''; }); return row; }); return rows; }; const handleFileUpload = async (event) => { const file = event.target.files?.[0]; if (!file) return; setIsLoading(true); try { const text = await file.text(); const parsed = parseCSV(text); setCsvData(parsed); } catch (error) { console.error('Error parsing CSV:', error); alert('Error parsing CSV file'); } finally { setIsLoading(false); } }; const clearData = () => { setCsvData([]); setHeaders([]); }; return React.createElement('div', { style: { width: '100%', maxWidth: '1200px', margin: '0 auto', padding: '1.5rem', background: 'var(--ck-bg)', border: '1px solid var(--ck-border)', borderRadius: 'var(--ck-radius)', color: 'var(--ck-text)' } }, React.createElement('div', { style: { display: 'flex', alignItems: 'center', gap: '1rem', marginBottom: '1.5rem' } }, React.createElement('label', { style: { cursor: 'pointer', background: 'var(--ck-accent)', color: 'white', padding: '0.5rem 1rem', borderRadius: 'var(--ck-radius)', display: 'flex', alignItems: 'center', gap: '0.5rem' } }, '📁 ', isLoading ? 'Loading...' : 'Import CSV', React.createElement('input', { type: 'file', accept: '.csv', onChange: handleFileUpload, style: { display: 'none' }, disabled: isLoading })), csvData.length > 0 && React.createElement('button', { onClick: clearData, style: { background: '#6b7280', color: 'white', padding: '0.5rem 1rem', borderRadius: 'var(--ck-radius)', border: 'none', cursor: 'pointer' } }, 'Clear Data')), csvData.length > 0 && React.createElement('div', { style: { marginTop: '1rem' } }, React.createElement('h3', { style: { fontSize: '1.125rem', fontWeight: '600', marginBottom: '1rem' } }, `CSV Data (${csvData.length} rows)`), React.createElement('div', { style: { overflowX: 'auto', border: '1px solid var(--ck-border)', borderRadius: 'var(--ck-radius)' } }, React.createElement('table', { style: { width: '100%', borderCollapse: 'collapse' } }, React.createElement('thead', { style: { background: '#f9fafb' } }, React.createElement('tr', null, headers.map((header, index) => React.createElement('th', { key: index, style: { padding: '0.75rem', textAlign: 'left', fontSize: '0.75rem', fontWeight: '500', textTransform: 'uppercase', borderBottom: '1px solid var(--ck-border)' } }, header)))), React.createElement('tbody', null, csvData.slice(0, 50).map((row, rowIndex) => React.createElement('tr', { key: rowIndex, style: { borderBottom: '1px solid var(--ck-border)' } }, headers.map((header, colIndex) => React.createElement('td', { key: colIndex, style: { padding: '0.75rem', fontSize: '0.875rem' } }, row[header])))))))); };

prompt: Make the CTA a pricing card with 3 tiers: Free, Pro $29/mo, Enterprise custom

Choose Your Plan

Start free, scale as you grow

{/* Billing Toggle */}

{tier.popular && (
Most Popular
)}

{tier.description}

{billingCycle === 'monthly' ? tier.price : tier.yearlyPrice} {tier.price !== 'Custom' && ( /{billingCycle === 'monthly' ? 'mo' : 'yr'} )}
    {tier.features.map((feature, featureIndex) => (
  • {feature}

))}

All plans include 14-day free trial. No credit card required.

); }
